buildCommand: START="$PWD"; ROOT="$PWD"; while [ ! -f "$ROOT/pnpm-workspace.yaml" ] && [ "$ROOT" != "/" ]; do ROOT=$(dirname "$ROOT"); done; if [ ! -f "$ROOT/pnpm-workspace.yaml" ]; then echo 'pnpm-workspace.yaml not found from current root' >&2; exit 127; fi; cd "$ROOT"; pnpm --filter @byzantium/core build; NUXT_IGNORE_LOCK=1 pnpm --filter playground generate; rm -rf "$START/dist"; cp -R "$ROOT/playground/.output/public" "$START/dist"
